vulnerability.reference: Proprietary model monetization incentivizes broad API access without query-level anomaly detection.
vulnerability.generated: Public API queries return unrestricted logit outputs that expose embedding projection matrix symmetries, enabling parameter inference.

impact.reference: Stolen model weights enable counterfeit LLM services, eroding provider revenue and market trust.
impact.generated: Proprietary model architecture and weights are extracted, enabling model counterfeiting and intellectual property theft.

dose_response.reference: Black-box extraction via embedding projection queries enables parameter theft, which in API access to production LLMs exposes proprietary models, leading to counterfeit services and amplified adversarial attacks.
dose_response.generated: Black-box embedding projection layer queries, through public API access to proprietary LLMs, trigger unrestricted logit outputs that expose matrix symmetries, leading to extraction of architecture and weights for model counterfeiting and intellectual property theft.
